Details: One study showed that inactivation of Cryptosporidum in water by ozone with hydrogen peroxide dosed to increase the production of the hydroxyl radical is less effective than water dosed with ozone alone (96.5% with ozone alone vs. 86.9% with a 0.6:1 peroxide to ozone ratio). This technology is not in the LT2 microbial tool box for control of Cryptosporidum.
